title: Auto Spreak
description:
Tired of keep pressing sprint key everytime to sprint, Auto Spreak comes with the solution. 
With Auto Spreak you can toggle your sprinting and sneak too
body:
AutoSpreak is a small **client-side** Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.4** that lets you toggle **AutoSprint** and **AutoSneak**, with a simple **HUD indicator** and an in-game **settings GUI (ClickGUI)**.

**Features**
- **AutoSprint** toggle (sprints for you when enabled)  
  - Options: **Only when moving**, **Sneak cancels AutoSprint**  
  - Won’t force sprint while using an item, and requires enough hunger
- **AutoSneak** toggle (holds sneak for you when enabled)
- **HUD overlay** showing **Sprint: ON/OFF** and **Sneak: ON/OFF**  
  - Toggleable, per-module HUD entries  
  - Optional **background**, **background color picker**, **brackets**, **text shadow**
- **In-game ClickGUI**  
  - Press **Right Shift** to open  
  - **Right-click** a module to open its settings and set an optional custom keybind

**Keybinds (defaults)**
- **R** = Toggle AutoSprint  
- **G** = Toggle AutoSneak  
- **H** = Toggle HUD overlay  
- **Right Shift** = Open ClickGUI  
All keybinds can be changed in Minecraft **Controls**.

**Installation**
You can download AutoSpreak on **Modrinth**, **CurseForge**, or **GitHub**.

Other distributions are **not endorsed**. If you find this mod reuploaded somewhere else, please let me know.

Fabric install guide: https://docs.fabricmc.net/players/installing-mods

**Dependencies**
- **Fabric API** (required)

**FAQ**
- **Can I use it in my modpack?** Yes.  
- **Do I need it on the server?** No — this is **client-side only** and should only be installed on the client.
